Hi Team,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to follow up on our discussion from yesterday's meeting regarding the Q2 product launch. As discussed, we need to finalize all deliverables by end of this month to meet our April 15th launch date.

John, I've attached the updated marketing copy for your review. Please provide feedback by this Friday, March 8th, so we can proceed with the design team. The copy is crucial for the landing page development.

Sarah

1. The value proposition in paragraph 2 needs stronger wording
2. The CTA button text should be more action-oriented

I'll send my detailed feedback by Thursday. Can we schedule a quick call to discuss before Friday?

John
